page.title: Set up GhostBot
page.subtitle: A few minutes to get chat, agents, and notifications ready.

llm.title: Choose your LLM provider
llm.subtitle: GhostBot needs this to chat. You can change it later.
llm.errorConnect: Couldn't connect. Check URL/key and try again.

docker.title: Docker check
docker.subtitle: Needed for coding agents. Optional.
docker.noImages: Socket reachable but no ghostbot coding-agent images found
docker.buildInstructions: Agent images are built locally. Run ./docker/build.sh from the repo root.
docker.socketMissingHelp: Coding agents won't work until this is fixed. See /docs#docker-mount for the compose setup.
docker.skip: Skip — I'll set this up later
docker.skipped: Skipped — agents disabled. Re-run wizard to configure.

github.title: GitHub PAT (optional)
github.subtitle: Required only if you want agents to push branches and open PRs.
github.errorConnect: GitHub rejected the token. Check scopes and try again.

notifications.title: Notifications (optional)
notifications.subtitle: Send job status alerts to Telegram or Slack.

done.title: You're set up
done.subtitle: Summary of what's configured.
done.confirmPartial: Some features are disabled. You can re-run setup from Admin → Setup at any time. Finish anyway?
